type_definitions.name: FsAdrFileAdapter
type_definitions.description: Filesystem adapter implementing the AdrFilePort secondary port. Walks knowledge/adr/*.md on the real filesystem; reads file contents and calls parse_adr_frontmatter to YAML-parse the string into domain AdrFrontMatter objects. Encapsulates both I/O and parsing so the usecase layer receives domain objects directly (CN-05). Follows the existing Fs-prefix adapter naming convention (FsTrackStore, FsCatalogueLoader, FsCatalogueSpecSignalsStore). Holds a private adr_dir: PathBuf field — the ADR directory path is private and accessed only via new(PathBuf) at construction; the schema_export captures only public fields so expected_members is intentionally empty. The CLI match arm for verify adr-signals constructs FsAdrFileAdapter + VerifyAdrSignalsInteractor directly in verify.rs following the established pattern (no interposing composition struct), consistent with all other verify subcommands.

type_definitions.name: parse_adr_frontmatter
type_definitions.description: Infrastructure free function that parses the raw content of an ADR Markdown file into a domain AdrFrontMatter value object. Uses the existing parse_yaml_frontmatter utility (infrastructure::verify::frontmatter module) to extract the YAML block, then uses serde_yaml to deserialize into AdrFrontMatterDto. For each AdrDecisionDto, dispatches on status: String to construct the correct domain typestate struct and wraps it in the matching AdrDecisionEntry variant. State-specific fields (implemented_in into ImplementedDecision, superseded_by into SupersededDecision) are passed at construction; AdrDecisionCommon is built from shared grounds fields. Status strings that do not match a known variant surface as AdrFrontMatterCodecError::InvalidDecisionField. Enforces explicit-key-presence detection via a serde_yaml::Value intermediate pass. serde derives live in infrastructure, not domain (CN-05). Stateless free function — the parsing logic takes a string and returns a Result; no struct state is threaded through. Precedent: parse_yaml_frontmatter in the same infrastructure::verify::frontmatter module is also a stateless free function. module_path is infrastructure::adr_decision::parse; expected_returns is ['AdrFrontMatter'] (not ['Result<AdrFrontMatter, AdrFrontMatterCodecError>'] because collect_type_names() in schema_export.rs unwraps Result<T,E> to extract only T).

type_definitions.name: AdrFrontMatterCodecError
type_definitions.description: Error type for YAML front-matter parse failures within parse_adr_frontmatter. YamlParse wraps serde_yaml errors; MissingAdrId covers missing required adr_id field; InvalidDecisionField covers per-decision field validation failures (unknown status string, forbidden-when-key-present violations, required-when-value violations). Infrastructure-layer concern — does not propagate serde types into domain.
